content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — Push entitlement (App/DealAlerts.entitlements:5) is paired with `scheduleHourlyDeals()` (App/NotificationScheduler.swift:7-10) that fires unconditional repeating hourly notifications, and description.txt explicitly advertises "alert you EVERY HOUR... unlimited notifications, all day long" — a textbook spam-push pattern.

Pierre: Apple's 4.5.4 explicitly bans using push notifications for promotions/marketing spam without clear user opt-in/value per alert, and this reads exactly like that — an hourly repeating "hot deal" blast with no apparent user-configurable frequency. Reviewers often reject apps whose marketing copy itself brags about high-frequency unsolicited notifications. Fix: make the schedule opt-in per deal/category, let users control frequency, and rewrite the marketing copy to avoid promising unlimited hourly pushes.
